title: Command Block Console
description: CBC is a datapack that adds a menu with useful commands that appears when you press SHIFT + RMB with a command block in your hand.
body:
Command Block Console, abbreviated as CBC, is a data package designed to make using commands easier and faster by adding a menu to chat that appears when you hold left shift and right-click with a command block in your hand.

In versions prior to 1.3, you do not need to hold down the shift key.

The menu contains commands such as:
- time set day, 
- time set night, 
- weather clear, 
- weather rain, 
- gamemode 3, 
- gamemode 2, 
- gamemode 1, 
- gamemode 0, 
- effect clear @s, 
- effect clear @a, 
- gamerule doMobSpawning false, 
- gamerule doMobSpawning true, 
- gamerule doDaylightCycle false, 
- gamerule doDaylightCycle true, 
- gamerule keepInventory false, 
- gamerule keepInventory true, 
- gamerule reducedDebugInfo false, 
- gamerule reducedDebugInfo true.
